source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Palpitation – 14

added_items.final_wording: Lists chest pain, dizziness or syncope, breathlessness, focal neurology, dehydration, family sudden death, exertional onset, systemic causes, and hypotension.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Palpitation – 14
